cycle: Hang a large red banner with yellow text across the central section of the building facade, just below the top floor windows.
Remove the large red banner with yellow text from the central section of the building facade.
Place a white radar dome on the flat roof of the left wing of the building.
Remove the white radar dome from the flat roof of the left wing of the building.
Attach a string of golden festive lights along the white columns of the ground floor entrance.
Remove the string of golden festive lights from the white columns of the ground floor entrance.
Mount a blue rectangular sign with white text on the upper right corner of the central building block.
Remove the blue rectangular sign with white text from the upper right corner of the central building block.
Install a black security camera on the leftmost white pillar of the main entrance portico.
Remove the black security camera from the leftmost white pillar of the main entrance portico.
long_chain: Change the trees and grass to vibrant autumn colors with red, orange, and yellow leaves, and scatter fallen leaves across the paved plaza.
Shift the lighting to a dramatic golden-hour sunset with long shadows stretching across the lawn and a sky filled with orange and purple clouds.
Add a thick layer of low-hanging fog that obscures the base of the building and the distant trees, creating a mysterious atmosphere.
Change the time to night, illuminating the building with bright architectural floodlights and glowing windows against a dark sky.
Cover the entire scene in a thick layer of fresh white snow, including the roof, ledges, and ground, and add falling snowflakes.
Transform the foreground plaza into a calm, shallow reflecting pool that mirrors the illuminated snowy building.
Transform the image into a realistic charcoal sketch with high contrast, visible paper texture, and rough shading strokes.
Apply a traditional Chinese ink wash painting style with black ink and subtle color washes on rice paper texture to the scene.
Convert the image into a classical oil painting style with thick impasto brushstrokes and rich, deep colors.
Apply a futuristic cyberpunk aesthetic with neon blue and pink accent lighting on the building edges and holographic elements near the entrance.
